top_signals.title: Trump Aims to Ease Lebanon Tensions to Extend Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump remains optimistic on reaching an interim peace deal with Iran soon, saying discussions with Iran continue at a rapid pace despite the Islamic Republic threatening to suspend talks because of Israel’s escalating attacks in Lebanon. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
